items.title: Latvia stuns the U.S. 4-2 at ice hockey worlds
items.summary: Sandis Vilmanis scored two empty-net goals to help Latvia upset the United States 4-2 on Saturday at the ice hockey world championship in Zurich.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.

items.title: Pep reveals biggest regret on eve of farewell
items.summary: Pep Guardiola has said his biggest regret at Manchester City is not giving England keeper Joe Hart the chance to prove himself.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
